name: 5q33_3_GM2A_TNIP1_SD
description: 5q33.3 SD pair surrounding TNIP1 and GM2A. GM2A is paralogous to NPC2 (14q24) and SAP-B/SAP-C (10q21) at the saposin-fold level. Short intragenic SDs and a flanking ~15 kb duplicon contribute to paralog confusion in lipid-storage-disease gene panels.

architecture.internal_structure: Short flanking SDs ~15-30 kb at ~92% identity around GM2A and TNIP1; intragenic SDs in TNIP1 introns; cross-chromosome paralog tracts in NPC2 (14q24).
